zh.Tythegston, Glamorgan, Wales: 威爾士格拉莫爾根泰斯頓
zh.Merthyr Mawr, Glamorgan, Wales: 威爾士格拉莫爾根莫希爾 馬福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mawd verch Hopkin於大約1270年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根莫希爾 馬福時，她的父親Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan-9歲，母親Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel-12歲。她和Wilcock Turberville至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.Merthyr Mawr, Glamorgan, Wales: 威尔士格拉莫爾根莫希爾 馬福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mawd verch Hopkin于大约1270年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根莫希爾 馬福时，她的父亲Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan-9岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel-12岁。她和Wilcock Turberville至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Hopkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh (southern): from a pet form of the personal name Hobb, a pet form of Robert (see Hobbs ).

variants.name: Robert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Gilles, Normand, Armand, Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Michel, Edouard, Gaston, Yves.

French, Walloon, English, German, Dutch, Flemish, and Breton (of French origin); Hungarian (Róbert): from the ancient Germanic personal name Ro(d)bert (Middle English Robert, Old French Ro(d)bert), composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This is found occasionally in Anglo-Saxon England before the Conquest, but in the main it was introduced into England by the Normans and quickly became popular among all classes of society. Pet forms and diminutives are found from an early date, Robin being particularly common. Compare Robair , Robar , Robare , and Rober .
In some cases also an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Hopkinson
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Hobkin (see Hopkin ) + -son.

variants.name: Hopkins
meanings: English and Welsh (Glamorgan): variant of Hopkin with genitival or excrescent -s. In Ireland, where the name is also frequent, it is sometimes Gaelicized as Mac Oibicín.
History: Stephen Hopkins (c. 1580–1644) was a pilgrim on the Mayflower in 1620 and one of the founders of Plymouth Colony. At his death he left seven children and eighteen grandchildren.

nameMeanings.name: Mawd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mawd verch Hopkin was born about 1270, in Merthyr Mawr, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan, was -9 and her mother, Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, was -12. She had at least 1 son with Wilcock Turberville.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mawd verch Hopkin est née environ 1270, à Merthyr Mawr, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan, avait -9 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, avait -12 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Wilcock Turberville.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mawd verch Hopkin um 1270 in Merthyr Mawr, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan -9 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel -12. Sie hatte mit Wilcock Turberville mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mawd verch Hopkin è nata il circa 1270 nel Merthyr Mawr, Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan, aveva -9 anni e sua madre, Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, aveva -12 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Wilcock Turberville.

ja.lifeSummary: Mawd verch Hopkinが約1270年にウェールズグラモーガンマースイル マウルで生まれた時，父Hopkin ap Hywel Fychanは-9歳，母Gwenllian verch Rhys Foelは-12歳であった。彼女はWilcock Turbervilleとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Mawd verch Hopkin(이)가 대략 1270년 웨일스 글램르건 머스이르 마르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan(은)는 -9세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel(은)는 -12세였다. 그녀는 Wilcock Turberville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mawd verch Hopkin nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Merthyr Mawr, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan, tinha -9 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, tinha -12 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Wilcock Turberville.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mawd verch Hopkin родилась около 1270 г. в местности миртир мар, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan было -9 год, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, -12. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Wilcock Turberville.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mawd verch Hopkin nació aproximadamente 1270, en Merthyr Mawr, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan, tenía -9 años y su mamá, Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, tenía -12 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Wilcock Turberville.
